prd_refs: PRD §6.1 Module commands — Model and Ollama (lines 419-427)
description: Start the Ollama service if it is installed but not running. On Windows, prefer launching the desktop app or `Start-Service`. On macOS, `open -a Ollama`. On Linux, `systemctl start ollama` if systemd is available, else display manual instructions. Never auto-install — the caller must run `Install-SlashOpsOllama` first.
notes: Linux without systemd needs explicit manual instructions; do not assume `service` either.
steps: TDD: When Ollama is already reachable, returns `AlreadyRunning = $true` without launching anything.
TDD: When not reachable but installed, attempts platform-appropriate start (mocked).
TDD: When not installed, returns guidance to call `Install-SlashOpsOllama` and does not attempt start.
TDD: Honours `SLASHOPS_NONINTERACTIVE = 1` by failing without prompting.
Mock platform branches in tests via thin private helpers.
name: [mdl-06] Start-SlashOpsOllama (per-platform)
